allow: PowerShell($pw = \(Get-Command npx\).Source; $pwDir = Split-Path \(npx which playwright 2>$null\) -Parent 2>$null; node -e "require.resolve\('playwright'\)" 2>&1; node -e "require.resolve\('@playwright/test'\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "h-dvh|inset-y-0|-translate-x-full|bars-3|mobileSidebar" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | Select-Object Value | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($dirs = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Jjzet\\AppData\\Local\\npm-cache\\_npx\\" | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; foreach \($d in $dirs\) { $f = "$d\\node_modules\\@playwright\\test\\package.json"; if \(Test-Path $f\) { Write-Host $f; break } })

PowerShell($dirs = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Jjzet\\AppData\\Local\\npm-cache\\_npx\\" | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; foreach \($d in $dirs\) { $f = "$d\\node_modules\\playwright\\package.json"; if \(Test-Path $f\) { Write-Host $f } })
PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "HTTP status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Response length: $\($r.Content.Length\)")
